results.title: Auto-recreate Milvus collection on embedding dimension mismatch
results.content: Fixed search_code/query failures caused by Milvus collections retaining 1024-dim schema after switching the embedder to 768 dims. MilvusVectorStore now validates the existing collection schema, drops and recreates mismatched collections with config.embedding.dimensions, and validates query/upsert vector lengths. build_vector_store now passes the configured embedding dimension into the Milvus adapter. Added unit coverage for mismatch reset and dimension validation.

results.title: Switch default local models to EmbeddingGemma and Gemma 4
results.content: Updated config defaults, compose envs, download script, docs, and runtime metadata from Qwen GGUFs to ggml-org/embeddinggemma-300M-GGUF and ggml-org/gemma-4-E2B-it-GGUF. Also changed default embedding dimension from 1024 to 768 and aligned Milvus collection defaults plus config tests.

results.title: Zalo inbound webhook normalization and routing
results.content: Aligned ProcessZaloWebhookUseCase to publish message.received so SQS consumer routes correctly. Expanded Zalo payload typing for root and events[] shapes, normalized sender/message IDs from string or number, and updated HandleZaloWebhookUseCase extraction fallbacks for sender/recipient/message/event_time. Added unit tests for process and handler use-cases covering root payload numeric IDs and events[] payload path.

results.title: Typed Zalo send response contract
results.content: Refactored zalo-oa.client sendTextMessage to use typed API contracts instead of generic Record<string,unknown>. Added ZaloSendTextApiResponse/ZaloSendTextApiData with known fields (error, message, error_name, data message identifiers), parse function from unknown payload, and typed success/error handling. Also fixed numeric parsing to support negative provider error codes for 'error' while keeping positive-only behavior for fields like expires_in.

results.title: Flatten Zalo rawProfile metadata contract across backend and UI
results.content: Refactored Zalo channel metadata rawProfile away from the old envelope shape { data, error, message }. In omi-channel-be, metadata.types.ts now defines a single flat ZaloOAProfileResponse interface with OA fields directly on the object (including zaloId/oaId/oa_id fallbacks), and VerifyChannelMetadataUseCase stores flat rawProfile objects. In findtourgoUI ListChannel.tsx, Zalo metadata reading now accesses rawProfile directly instead of rawProfile.data and falls back across oa_id, oaId, and zaloId.
